headline: DeepL expands into Silicon Valley, adds Mixhalo team and technology to accelerate Voice AI at scale
summary: DeepL, a global leader in Language AI, today announced that the team and technology behind Mixhalo, the San Francisco-based platform for real-time, ultra-low latency audio, have joined DeepL. The investment expands the capabilities of DeepL Voice, the company's real-time AI voice translation solution, to include larger and more complex environments where speed, clarity, and reliability are critical, including major events, conferences, customer support and business workflows.

headline: AST SpaceMobile just proved biggest skeptics wrong, for now
summary: AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) launched three satellites into orbit on Wednesday, 17th June, and the stock jumped 6% in response. The reaction looks like a simple relief rally after a clean mission. It is actually a direct rebuttal to the specific argument Wall Street’s bears have been making for the past ...
